---
title: "Appendix: Quantifying Hidden Exploitation"
subtitle: "Online Supplementary Materials for Social Indicators Research Submission"
# preferred:
# cd paper/SIR/appendix-v7 && quarto render 
author:
  - name: Caroline Emberson
    affiliation: University of Nottingham
  - name: Scott Moser
    affiliation: University of Nottingham
date: 11 July 2026
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
bibliography:
  - ../references/ce-library.bib
  - ../references/sm-cited.bib
csl: ../references/apa.csl
fontsize: 12pt
geometry: margin=1in
linestretch: 1.15
number-sections: true
tbl-cap-location: top
fig-cap-location: bottom
crossref:
  chapters: true
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
  docx:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    highlight-style: github
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    keep-tex: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{amsthm,amsmath,amsfonts,amssymb,float,caption,subcaption}
        \usepackage{booktabs,longtable,array}
    fig-pos: "H"
    fig-width: 6.5
    fig-height: 4
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    citecolor: BrickRed
    urlcolor: blue
    link-citations: true
---

<!--
Master orchestrator for the SIR appendix.

Rendering:
  From RStudio: open this file and click 'Render'.
  From terminal (article mode):
    quarto render paper/SIR/appendix-v7.qmd
  From terminal (book mode, letter-based A.1/B.1/D.1 numbering):
    cd paper/SIR/appendix-v7 && quarto render

Numbering trade-off:
  - Book render (terminal) uses appendix letter numbering: Table A.1, B.1, D.1, ...
  - Article render (RStudio or single-file terminal command) uses numeric chapter
    scoping: Table 1.1 (Section 1 = Codebook), 2.1 (Section 2 = Survey), 4.1
    onward (Section 4 = Sensitivity), etc.

The section files under appendix-v7/ are identical in either mode; only the
numbering scheme differs. All internal @-refs resolve correctly in both.

Figure paths in the included files are '../figures/...', which resolves
relative to the section file's own location (paper/SIR/appendix-v7/) and
therefore to paper/SIR/figures/ regardless of which orchestrator invokes them.
-->

{{< include appendix-v7/index.qmd >}}

{{< include appendix-v7/A-codebook.qmd >}}

{{< include appendix-v7/B-survey.qmd >}}

{{< include appendix-v7/C-bootstrap.qmd >}}

{{< include appendix-v7/D-sensitivity.qmd >}}


\newpage

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
